title: Children
signature_elements: Dreamy piano melody over rolling trance pads, emotional breakdown, simple but iconic chord progression
strudel_approach: Use triangle oscillator for the piano-like melody with short decay. Layer sawtooth pad with .cutoff() sweep and heavy .room(0.8). Add .delay(0.5, 0.6) for spaciousness. Use .jux(rev) on the pad layer for stereo width.

title: 9PM (Till I Come)
signature_elements: Acoustic guitar sample chopped over trance beat, uplifting synth stabs, bright supersaw lead
strudel_approach: Sawtooth oscillator with superimpose for detuned unison to approximate the supersaw. Short pluck notes with triangle for guitar-like texture. .cutoff() automation rising through the phrase. .delay(0.375, 0.5) for rhythmic echoes.

title: Xpander
signature_elements: Deep rolling bassline, evolving filtered pads, hypnotic arpeggiated sequences, long build structure
strudel_approach: Sawtooth bass with .cutoff() sweep using perlin.range(200, 1200) for organic movement. Layer sine sub-bass. Arpeggiated triangle sequence with .delay(0.333, 0.6). Pads with .vowel() filter modulation and .room(0.7).

title: Adagio for Strings
signature_elements: Classical melody reimagined with supersaw leads, massive build and drop, emotional string-like synths
strudel_approach: Superimpose multiple detuned sawtooth oscillators for supersaw. Slow .cutoff() sweep for the build. .room(0.9) for cathedral reverb. Use .jux(rev) for massive stereo image. Long sustained notes with legato phrasing.

title: Communication
signature_elements: Pulsing sawtooth lead, rolling 16th-note bassline, classic trance gate effect, airy breakdown pads
strudel_approach: Sawtooth lead with rhythmic .gain() modulation for gate effect. Square wave bass in 16th-note pattern with .cutoff(800). Sine pad layer with .room(0.8) and .delay(0.5, 0.5) for the breakdown.

title: For an Angel
signature_elements: Iconic rising synth melody, euphoric breakdown, layered pads with filter sweeps, classic 90s trance production
strudel_approach: Triangle oscillator for the melodic lead with slight pitch bend. Sawtooth pad with .cutoff() sweep from 300 to 3000. .delay(0.375, 0.55) for rhythmic depth. Stack with superimpose for thickness on the main riff.

title: Sun & Moon
signature_elements: Emotional vocal trance, lush layered supersaws, piano breakdown, anthemic chord progression
strudel_approach: Multiple superimposed sawtooth oscillators slightly detuned for supersaw chords. Triangle for piano-like plucks. .room(0.85) for lush reverb. .cutoff() automation synced to 4-bar phrases. .jux(rev) on pads for width.

title: Around the World
signature_elements: Repetitive vocal hook, funky filtered bassline, phaser-swept synth stabs, minimal but infectious groove
strudel_approach: Square wave bass with .cutoff() modulated by perlin.range(400, 2000) for filter sweep funk. Short sawtooth stabs with .vowel() filter. Tight four-on-the-floor kick pattern. .room(0.3) for tight space.

title: Da Funk
signature_elements: Gritty distorted synth riff, heavy filter modulation, lo-fi crunch, relentless groove
strudel_approach: Sawtooth oscillator with aggressive .cutoff() sweep using perlin.range(200, 4000). Simple repeating note pattern. Minimal .room(0.2). Heavy emphasis on the filter as the primary musical element.

title: Born Slippy .NUXX
signature_elements: Driving sawtooth bassline, spoken-word vocals, hypnotic build, raw energy, layered percussion
strudel_approach: Sawtooth bass with .cutoff() sweep building over 16 bars. Layer multiple percussion patterns using different timbres. Square wave stabs for the hook. perlin.range() on .cutoff() for organic evolution. .room(0.5) for warehouse feel.

title: Insomnia
signature_elements: Iconic piano riff, massive build structure, flute-like synth melody, spoken word into euphoric climax
strudel_approach: Triangle oscillator for piano-like riff with short decay. Sine oscillator for flute-like melody with .room(0.7). Sawtooth pad slowly introduced with .cutoff() sweep from 200 to 2500 over long phrase. .delay(0.375, 0.5) on melody.

title: Spastik
signature_elements: Entirely built from one 909 snare drum sample, extreme rhythmic variation, hypnotic minimalism
strudel_approach: Single noise burst source with varying .decay() and .cutoff() values. Euclidean rhythms with shifting densities. Minimal processing - just .room(0.2). Focus on pattern variation and rhythmic complexity over harmony.

title: The Bells
signature_elements: Relentless bell/metallic percussion loop, raw 909 drums, stripped-back hypnotic techno, no breakdown
strudel_approach: Sine oscillator with short decay and high pitch for bell tones. Fast repeating pattern with subtle pitch variations. Raw kick pattern. Minimal .room(0.15). perlin.range() on pitch for slight metallic variation.

title: Consumed
signature_elements: Ultra-minimal acid-tinged bass, vast empty space, glacial pacing, subtle 303-style filter movement
strudel_approach: Sawtooth oscillator with very slow .cutoff() sweep using perlin.range(100, 800) for 303-like movement. Lots of silence in the pattern. Sine sub-bass. .room(0.9) with long tail. Extremely sparse arrangement.

title: Selected Ambient Works (Xtal)
signature_elements: Warm lo-fi pads, half-heard melodies, breakbeat patterns, dreamy washed-out atmosphere, cassette tape warmth
strudel_approach: Triangle pad with heavy .room(0.95) and .delay(0.5, 0.7). Lo-fi character via .crush(10). Sine melody with perlin.range() on pitch for wobbly tape feel. Breakbeat-style rhythmic pattern. .jux(rev) for dreamy width.

title: Teardrop
signature_elements: Harpsichord-like plucked synth loop, deep sub-bass, ethereal vocal, minimal beat, haunting atmosphere
strudel_approach: Triangle with very short decay for harpsichord-like pluck pattern. Sine sub-bass with slow movement. Sparse beat pattern. .room(0.7) and .delay(0.375, 0.45) for atmosphere. .jux(rev) on pluck for stereo spread.

title: Atlantis (I Need You)
signature_elements: Lush string pads, rolling breakbeats, deep sub-bass, jazzy atmospheric textures, liquid movement
strudel_approach: Sawtooth pad with .cutoff(1800) and .room(0.8) for lush strings. Fast breakbeat-style patterns at high BPM. Sine sub-bass with slow pitch movement. .delay(0.176, 0.5) tuned to tempo. .jux(rev) on pads. .vowel() for warmth.

title: Inner City Life
signature_elements: Timestretched breakbeats, soaring vocal, metallic synth textures, dark-but-beautiful atmosphere
strudel_approach: Fast chopped patterns for breakbeat feel. Sawtooth with .crush() for metallic texture. Triangle melody with .room(0.85) and .delay(0.353, 0.6). Sine sub-bass. .cutoff() sweep with perlin.range() for evolving texture.

title: Nightcall
signature_elements: Pulsing arpeggiated synth bass, vocoder vocals, 80s-inspired production, cinematic driving atmosphere
strudel_approach: Sawtooth arpeggio pattern with .cutoff(1200). Square wave bass for weight. Superimpose for detuned unison on lead synth. .delay(0.25, 0.3) for 80s depth. .room(0.5). perlin.range() on .cutoff() for slow movement.

title: Turbo Killer
signature_elements: Aggressive distorted synth leads, heavy 80s metal-influenced production, dark arpeggios, cinematic intensity
strudel_approach: Sawtooth lead with superimpose for massive detuned unison. Fast arpeggiated pattern with .cutoff(2500). Square wave bass. Driving straight beat. .room(0.4). Aggressive .gain() levels.

title: I Feel Love
signature_elements: Pioneering sequenced 16th-note synth arpeggios, Moog bassline, four-on-the-floor kick, proto-electronic dance production
strudel_approach: Fast 16th-note sawtooth arpeggio pattern with .cutoff(1500). Sine bass on root note. Steady four-on-the-floor pulse. .room(0.3) for tight disco space. Simple harmonic movement. Focus on relentless sequencer energy.

title: Pjanoo
signature_elements: Iconic piano riff with filter build, massive drop, progressive structure, euphoric climax
strudel_approach: Triangle oscillator for piano riff with short decay. .cutoff() sweep from 300 to 4000 over 16 bars for the build. Sawtooth pad layer entering at the drop with superimpose for width. .room(0.6). .jux(rev) on the piano riff.

title: Strobe
signature_elements: 10-minute progressive build, evolving pad textures, arpeggiated synth sequences, emotional chord progression, ambient intro to driving climax
strudel_approach: Sawtooth arpeggiated sequence with .cutoff() slowly sweeping up over many bars. Superimpose for detuned unison on the main synth. Triangle pad underneath with .room(0.8). .delay(0.25, 0.4). Build layers gradually. perlin.range() on filter for organic feel.

title: Acid Tracks
signature_elements: Raw Roland TB-303 acid bassline, squelchy resonant filter sweeps, 808 drum machine, hypnotic repetition, genre-defining
strudel_approach: Sawtooth bass with high-resonance .cutoff() sweep using perlin.range(150, 3000). Accent certain steps with higher cutoff. Simple repeating note pattern with occasional slides. .room(0.2) for raw feel.

title: Papua New Guinea
signature_elements: Ethereal vocal sample, lush layered pads, breakbeat elements, tropical atmosphere, dreamy progression
strudel_approach: Sawtooth pad with .vowel() cycling through vowels for vocal-like quality. .room(0.9) and .delay(0.5, 0.65) for ethereal space. Breakbeat-influenced rhythm. Triangle lead with .jux(rev). perlin.range() on .cutoff() for evolving texture.

title: Sandstorm
signature_elements: Iconic sawtooth lead riff, driving beat, massive build-ups, filter sweeps, simple but unforgettable hook
strudel_approach: Sawtooth lead with superimpose for detuned unison on the main riff. .cutoff() sweep for build sections. Four-on-the-floor driving beat. .room(0.4). Short .delay(0.125, 0.3) for thickness. Rhythmic .gain() modulation for pump effect.
